1812750.name: The Wanderer Original Soundtrack
1812750.description:
Enjoy The Wanderer Original Soundtrack! Packed with 31 tracks, some light, some heavy, all atmospheric! Use this music to study, to relax or even while gaming.

Making the music for this game was one of the most challenging parts, especially since I am not experienced at it. However, this learning experience has been so valuable and I love how the soundtrack turned out. The Wanderer is of course a free game, so if you liked the music or you just want to throw some money my way please buy and enjoy this soundtrack! There's even a couple bonus tracks at the end! ;)
